title: DarkMinimal
description: A very clean transparent hotbar. Compatible with many other resource packs!
body:
This pack is a texture hotbar overlay. 

Yes, I've included textures for the main screen and the escape menu options, because I thought it would be cool. 

You can use this pack with many other resources packs, but please place this pack the highest in the list so that it can work properly! 

I recommend using this pack with DefaultDarkMode. It looks really good together!
